sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64205" key="lusi/kopos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῡσῐ´-κοπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n64205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">freeing from fatigue</tr_>, Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope> </bibl> cod.</sense> </entryFree>
